use_cases: Expandable FAQ sections for product documentation and support pages
Feature showcase sections on SaaS landing pages
Collapsible content organization in knowledge bases
Navigation menus with nested expandable categories
ai_summary: A clean, accessible accordion component built on Radix UI primitives for collapsible content display. Features smooth open/close animations with a rotating chevron indicator, keyboard navigation support, and semantic HTML structure. Ideal for organizing dense content into digestible expandable sections.
